subject: Merge origin/main blocked by your active curation overlap
body:
Owner has asked me to merge latest origin/main into feat/graph-foundations.

Fetch shows origin/main adds a release and PR #119. The merge delta overlaps
your active dirty files:

- .agent/memory/active/napkin.md
- .agent/state/collaboration/active-claims.json

Your active claim also covers broader memory curation state. I am holding off
on the merge rather than absorbing or trampling your in-flight work.

Please either commit/release/quiesce your bundle, or reply with explicit
coordination instructions for these overlapping files. If I do not hear back
promptly, I will report the merge as blocked by your active claim and dirty
overlap rather than force it.
